fix(lint): exclude goconst on test files

Test data with repeated string literals does not benefit
from constant extraction; the noise outweighs the signal.

author: appleboy
message:
ci: modernize and consolidate CI workflows and security scanning

- Remove the Bearer PR Check workflow
- Update actions/checkout and setup-go to latest major versions across all workflows
- Update CodeQL and SARIF upload actions to latest major versions
- Consolidate and improve Trivy security scanning workflow, including medium severity and extra scan steps
- Remove redundant Trivy scan workflow

Signed-off-by: appleboy <appleboy.tw@gmail.com>

author: appleboy
message:
ci: update CI tooling and refine supported Go versions

- Update golangci-lint GitHub Action from v8 to v9
- Remove Go 1.23 from test matrix

Signed-off-by: appleboy <appleboy.tw@gmail.com>

author: appleboy
message:
chore: update Go version and refresh dependencies to latest releases

- Update Go version requirement to 1.24.0
- Upgrade direct dependencies gin-gonic/gin and testify to newer versions
- Upgrade various indirect dependencies to newer versions
- Add new indirect dependencies including go-yaml, kr/text, quic-go, qpack, and uber/mock
- Remove indirect dependencies that are no longer required

Signed-off-by: appleboy <appleboy.tw@gmail.com>
